style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=light-dark(#eeeeee,#1f2020);strokeColor=light-dark(#999999,#cccccc);fontColor=light-dark(#333333,#cccccc);" value="ResponseKeyNT = HMAC-MD5(NT_hash, UTF-16LE(UPPER(username)+domain))" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="102" width="299" x="155" y="380" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="6t1HZQpEqbdRQhjhU-6p-10" parent="1" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=light-dark(#eeeeee,#1f2020);strokeColor=light-dark(#999999,#cccccc);fontColor=light-dark(#333333,#cccccc);" value="SessionBaseKey = HMAC-MD5(ResponseKeyNT, NTProofStr)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="102" width="260" x="478" y="636" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="6t1HZQpEqbdRQhjhU-6p-12" parent="1"
